Michael P. Malone Centennial Mall
tags.description: ...he joined MSU in 1967 as Assistant Professor of History. A prolific scholarly author, his research and public presentations took him to every corner of Montana, his adopted state. With Irish good humor and erudition, he described and analyzed...
tags.inscription: Michael P. Malone (1940-1999) was an award winning teacher and nationally prominent historian of the American  West who became the tenth President of Montana State University (1991-1999). Born in the small town of Pomeroy, Washington...
tags.note: ...the nation's western experience. President Malone presided over the reconstruction of the space around us here. Think of him as he surveyed this beautiful valley and know that you, too, belong to his West.
